_comment: 実装状態の単一台帳。全ての状態判定はこのファイルを参照する。

ga4_ecommerce.name: GA4 e-commerce events
ga4_ecommerce.verification_detail: Custom Pixel created via Shopify GraphQL. view_item/add_to_cart/purchase events configured.
ga4_ecommerce.notes: Data accumulation in progress. Events configured but GA4 data needs 24-48h to appear.

ga4_connection.name: GA4 Data API connection
ga4_connection.verification_detail: GCP service account key configured. GA4_PROPERTY_ID set. Data retrieval confirmed.
ga4_connection.notes: Runs in GitHub Actions with GCP_KEY secret.

search_console.name: Search Console API connection
search_console.verification_detail: Same GCP service account. Impressions/clicks data retrieved.

pinterest_api.name: Pinterest API connection
pinterest_api.verification_detail: .pinterest_token.json exists. Trial access approved. 7 boards created. Standard access pending review.
pinterest_api.notes: Pin creation requires Standard access (under review). Read operations work.

instagram_api.name: Instagram Graph API connection
instagram_api.notes: Extended insights permissions limited. Basic posting works.

tiktok_api.name: TikTok API connection
tiktok_api.verification_detail: App review submitted with ToS URL fix. Awaiting review result.
tiktok_api.notes: Sandbox OAuth successful. Production awaiting app review.

ebay_price_sync.name: eBay to Shopify price sync
ebay_price_sync.target: eBay Browse API + Shopify Admin API
ebay_price_sync.verification_detail: eBay token obtained. 58 SKUs mapped (EB-xxxxx). 4 price changes logged.
ebay_price_sync.notes: Runs in daily inspection. price_sync_log.json tracks changes.

ebay_image_sync.name: eBay to Shopify image sync
ebay_image_sync.target: eBay Browse API + Shopify Admin API
ebay_image_sync.verification_detail: image_sync.py created. Checks products with <3 images. 291 images added on first run.
ebay_image_sync.notes: Only checks products with fewer than 3 images to reduce API load.

wordpress_api.name: WordPress REST API connection
wordpress_api.verification_detail: WP_USER/WP_APP_PASSWORD configured. GET/POST/DELETE all confirmed working.
wordpress_api.notes: Intermittent timeouts due to server instability (XServer). Not a config issue.

shipping_policy.name: Shipping policy page
shipping_policy.verification_detail: HTTP 200, 1011 chars. Set via shopPolicyUpdate GraphQL mutation.

refund_policy.name: Refund policy page
refund_policy.verification_detail: HTTP 200, 1142 chars. Set via shopPolicyUpdate GraphQL mutation.

privacy_policy.name: Privacy policy page
privacy_policy.verification_detail: HTTP 200. Includes Pinterest API and TikTok API sections.

trust_badges.name: Trust badges on product pages
trust_badges.verification_detail: All 58 active products have condition/trust language. Verified via bulk audit.

product_descriptions.name: Product description quality
product_descriptions.verification_detail: All 58 products have 100+ words. CRO score 7/8+ for all products. Alt text 100%. Trust 100%.
product_descriptions.notes: MAINTENANCE MODE: page_improvement near-complete. Monitor for regressions only.

dtc_transfer.name: eBay-to-DTC page optimization
dtc_transfer.verification_detail: All 58 products pass DTC 3-check. 0 issues remaining.
dtc_transfer.notes: MAINTENANCE MODE: monitor for new products only.

category_gap_focus.name: Category gap strengthening
category_gap_focus.verification_detail: G&A: 4 products, 0 blog articles. Weekly focus set. SNS posted.
category_gap_focus.notes: NEW PRIORITY: Blog article + more products + collection traffic.

blog_auto_post.name: Blog auto post with quality control
blog_auto_post.verification_detail: Quality gate: min 800w, 3 images, 3 H2. Gemini prompt redesigned. Featured image/category/tag auto-set.

sns_auto_post.name: SNS auto posting (IG + FB)
sns_auto_post.verification_detail: Instagram and Facebook auto-post confirmed. Video posting via separate workflow.

collection_setup.name: Collection and menu setup
collection_setup.verification_detail: 8 categories in menu: Action Figures, Figures & Statues, Electronic Toys, Trading Cards, Video Games, Media & Books, Plush & Soft Toys, Goods & Accessories.

self_learning_system.name: Self-learning system (proposals/experiments/research)
self_learning_system.verification_detail: 15 proposals, 5 experiments, 7 research entries. Accumulating daily.
self_learning_system.notes: Accuracy evaluation needs more data (target: 30+ proposals).

bug_audit.name: Bug and anomaly audit system
bug_audit.verification_detail: 5-area audit: API/automation/data/quality/agent. Recurrence tracking via bug_audit_log.json.

review_system.name: Shopify review system (Judge.me)
review_system.verification_detail: Rejected by Harada. Reason: eBay negative feedback management fatigue. Will reconsider when sales stabilize.

status_definitions.completed_improvement_phase: 実施済み。基盤は完了しているが活用改善は継続中。
status_definitions.on_hold: 保留。外部審査待ちなど。
